steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize the order in which the two works entered the public domain — which came first, which came second. The notes provide specific years: 2020 for Billy Budd, Sailor and 2021 for The Common Reader. The correct choice must show clear sequence, not just confirm both are now public domain.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'both treated as simultaneous, no dates': omits the years and implies both entered at the same time. ✗
  • Choice B — 'only 2021 mentioned': references only one year and muddles the sequence. ✗
  • Choice C — 'explicit sequence with both years': states Billy Budd, Sailor "entered the public domain in 2020" and The Common Reader "following in 2021," establishing unmistakable order. ✓
  • Choice D — 'both treated as simultaneous, no dates': like A, omits dates and implies simultaneity. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
